candidates.why: Best match for top-line revenue; broader and more comprehensive than specific sub-revenue lines like insurance revenue or FX business revenue.
A revenue subcomponent, but not the overall top line for the bank.

candidates.row_label: Net Foreign Exchange Income - Business Revenue
candidates.why: A narrow revenue component, not total revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the broad top-line revenue row.

No clear cost of goods sold/cost of sales line is reported. This is a bank/financial institution statement where operating/interest/insurance expense lines do not map cleanly to standard COGS for PROF. Therefore treat COGS as missing.

candidates.why: Broad operating overhead bucket; useful for years where explicit SG&A is missing, though it appears to include depreciation/amortization and is not ideal by itself.
Explicit SG&A line and the preferred choice when available.
Potential overhead component in some years, but less preferred than explicit SG&A and may overlap with broader operating expense totals.
Not an expense row; not relevant for SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Contains depreciation and must be excluded from XSGA_COMPONENTS.

variables.notes: Per hierarchy, an explicit SG&A row exists but appears missing for some years in the preview, so included both 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' and the broader 'Operating expenses' bucket to maximize coverage across years. Although 'Operating expenses' may include depreciation/amortization, the instructions specifically prefer pairing it with SG&A when SG&A is only partially populated. No dedicated R&D line was found, so nothing additional was added for R&D.
No dedicated research and development expense line appears in the income statement.

candidates.why: Best primary interest expense line.
Only a minor component of total interest expense, not preferred as primary line.
Duplicate semantic label of the main interest expense line; useful as alternate priority due to label variation.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest detail, not the main interest expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the main reported interest expense line with casing variants as a priority list for possible label changes over time.

candidates.why: Only a component of equity, not total book equity.
Best match because it represents parent/shareholder equity and excludes non-controlling interest, avoiding double counting with MIB.
Includes non-controlling interest, so less preferred when a parent-equity line exists.
Entire balance sheet total, not book equity.

variables.notes: Used parent/shareholder equity to exclude non-controlling interest from BE.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not the preferred balance sheet stock measure for MIB.
Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; appropriate for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet label; useful as alternate priority line.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred over balance sheet line.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet non-controlling interest labels as priority alternatives.
